analysis_commentary: Within-noise neutral. Last probe legal_mass=0.533 (baseline 0.597) and max_prob=0.21 (baseline 0.14) — both well under GOAL thresholds. pEnt sits at 6.87 (vs 6.45 baseline) giving more headroom against collapse, no value saturation, gNorm 73 max. Same 538 step count as baseline. 1 arena, no promotion. Higher pEnt is the predicted entropy-bonus effect; legal_mass within plausible variance of baseline (which itself was on the high end of run-to-run distribution).
